meaning: adj.怀有二心的,非常灵巧的
examples: The results showed that the parrots with the strongest foot preferences worked out the puzzle far more quickly than their ambidextrous peers.
A switch - hitter in baseball should be naturally ambidextrous.
Jack is an ambidextrous hitter; he can bat right - handed or left - handed.
Compared with the average person, Cowgill would classify as ambidextrous, possessing above-average coordination with both hands.
Thanks to its perfectly-balanced, ambidextrous V-shaped design, the Lua delivers supreme comfort to both left- and right-handers.
